== Notes for [[Item:Q78787|Q78787]] ==

http://worldconnect.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=lseverin&id=I25833

Downloaded from the Bruce Cooley Pusch RootsWeb site. Please remove the symbols I've inserted in many of the names like (L),(P) and(BCP). Also please delete the (NOTES)I've written in some entries in the first person, the notes that refer just to me.

SISTER OF SENATOR RUFINUS

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F294096FF671EFBBE49822EF79916C78B5
geni:6000000003827324679

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
